name: Ruby on Rails developer
cv:
Andrii Kuluiev | Ruby on Rails developer|+380950558145 |andreykuluev96@gmail.com| Lviv, Ukraine|https://www.linkedin.com/in/andrii-kuluiev-0353aa150/ | telegram: @andriik96
Full-Stack Ruby on Rails Engineer | Product & Startup Developer | Building scalable products for fintech, retail & 400k-user platforms

About me:
I build products that solve real business problems and make life easier for the people who use them. For the last few years, I’ve been working with fintech, high-load communication tools, and retail automation — taking ideas from first sketches all the way to production.

What I do best:
I work across the full stack with a strong focus on Ruby on Rails, clean architecture, and automated tests. I enjoy designing systems, improving performance, and keeping code elegant and predictable.
I’ve also led small teams, mentored juniors, and handled product delivery for apps used by hundreds of thousands of users.
What I’ve worked on:
I’ve developed solutions for:
- a Norwegian fintech startup (accounting software for small businesses)
- a German product company where I built and launched product (a system for controlling electronic shelf labels)

I’ve also mentored a trainee developer and occasionally acted as a small-team lead.

How I work:
Clear communication, ownership, and a calm, pragmatic engineering style. I like when code is predictable, easy to read, and easy to maintain — both for me and for the team after me
I’m a team player who likes to stay hands-on, learn fast, and deliver with quality.

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Ruby on Rails developer with 5+ years of commercial experience designing, building, and maintaining
web applications. Proven experience leading full project lifecycles from concept to MVP, including
architecture planning, test coverage, and deployment to production environments.

● Accomplished faster pull request review cycles, as measured by reduced review time, by adding an AI-powered preliminary code review flow to GitHub Actions.

● Accomplished high code reliability, as measured by 90% test coverage and automated deployments, by implementing a comprehensive test suite and setting up CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.
